jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd!
